narrative:
Chesapeake Union Ex Vill Sd (Lawrence) exempted village school district has 4,776 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.6 percentage points.
